takeaways.decode: `grouped_bmm` changes decode total self CUDA time by -0.10% (-0.04 ms) and changes the selected GEMM-like view by 1.08% (+0.30 ms) versus `palu`; dispatch share of the selected view moves from 42.83% to 42.71% (+0.12 pp), with `gemv_kernels` as the largest recovered bucket.
takeaways.prefill: `grouped_bmm` changes prefill total self CUDA time by -0.69% (-1.26 ms) and changes the selected GEMM-like view by 0.66% (+0.98 ms) versus `palu`; dispatch share of the selected view moves from 48.07% to 48.07% (-0.00 pp), with `dispatch_ops` as the largest recovered bucket.
